title: Mac Miller
html:
Stub. Pittsburgh rapper / producer (1992–2018) whose lyrics function in Yahir's corpus as late-night emotional substrate, especially the 2009-era K.I.D.S. / The High Life / The Jukebox mixtape window.

In-vault appearances

  • 2022 02 26 2009 mac miller lyrics five people rooming — 4:51am freshman-year tab, lyrics about "space, understanding suicide pain her cutting yourself" sitting next to a sophomore-housing decision tab.
  • 2025 07 18 slideshow death song — Mac Miller surfaces again three years later as a death-song / slideshow reference.

The two appearances bookend a period: 19-year-old Yahir using Mac Miller to process pain at 4am, 22-year-old Yahir picking him as the song for a death-themed slideshow. Same source, different functions.

Why it matters

Mac Miller's death (2018, accidental overdose at 26) was a generational pain-marker for the cohort Yahir was 16 inside of. The 2009-mixtape-era lyrics carry the additional layer of "before the death-of-the-author shadow" — Yahir is engaging the work specifically by year, not by post-mortem canon.
